rationale: Gov't Code §2001.081 governs rules of evidence in contested administrative hearings. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The rules of evidence as applied in a nonjury civil case in a district court of this state shall apply to a contested case
_note: Rule concerns administrative hearing evidence standards; no nexus to homestead exemption valuation thresholds.
